name: Citrus Pudding-Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease an 8-inch by 8-inch glass baking dish. In a large bowl, combine sugar, flour, and salt. With a wire whisk, beat in milk, egg yolks, melted margarine or butter, lemon juice, orange juice, and orange peel.
2. In a small bowl, with a mixer set to high speed, beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Fold one-fourth of the whites into the orange mixture; gently fold in the remaining whites. Pour the batter into the baking dish.
3. Set the baking dish in a roasting pan and place it on the oven rack. Carefully pour boiling water into the roasting pan so that it comes halfway up the sides of the baking dish. Bake for 40 minutes or until the top is golden and set (the dessert will separate into pudding and cake layers). Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then serve immediately.
